### 内容精炼

通过图表增强引用、一致性和呈现效果

项目介绍

SurveyX框架分为【准备与生成】两大核心阶段

准备阶段完成文献收集与预处理，生成阶段专注内容构建与优化，以确保最终产出逻辑严谨、品质卓越的综述报告。

![SurveyX Workflow](https://surveyx.cn/_nuxt/workflow.DGs7avcm.jpg)

案例展示

探索特定领域的结构化问卷，包含批判性分析和视觉增强。

![Survey Example](https://surveyx.cn/_nuxt/example-item1.DLrghNfQ.jpg)

Bong Joon-ho Cinematic Universe and Its Multidimensional Analysis: A Survey

![Survey Example](https://surveyx.cn/_nuxt/example-item2.C_QE6QTD.jpg)

A Survey of Space Object Sensing and Space Situational Awareness Technologies

![Survey Example](https://surveyx.cn/_nuxt/example-item3.DcajuCdd.jpg)

A Survey of the PCP Theorem and Its Connections to Approximation and Complexity Theory

![Survey Example](https://surveyx.cn/_nuxt/example-item4.BwhrZ4Pr.jpg)

A Survey on Fake News Detection and Misinformation Detection Using NLP and Machine Learning

![Survey Example](https://surveyx.cn/_nuxt/example-item5.P15PdQ5d.jpg)

A Survey of Large Language Models System Architectures Integration and Applications in AI and NLP

![Survey Example](https://surveyx.cn/_nuxt/example-item6.vlb7oaht.jpg)

Prompt Programming and Large Language Models: A Survey
